rules: Every round summary must state: order, biggest shortboard, repair action, verification evidence, next order.
Metric gains blocked unless tied to direct file evidence.
h_entropy can increase only when log separates fact/inference/hypothesis/verification.
t_cycle can decrease only when round avoids non-required lookups.
If evidence is only narrative, all metrics remain unchanged.
